commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A focused automated repair can preserve the useful Telegram /compact ack while restoring dispatcher admission and hook ownership.; Needs attention: There are no dependency or supply-chain changes, but the direct delivery path bypasses outbound hook cancellation that can be used as a policy boundary.; Review finding: [P1] Keep command resolution under dispatcher admission — extensions/telegram/src/bot-native-c... (sha=3d2a50037b385628d8616b6f5b56e22cd64db41f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Telegram generic/native slash command handling so `/compact` status replies are marked deliverable and native status notices can be delivered directly, with focused command and Telegram tests.

PR surface: Source +85, Tests +234. Total +319 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: yes. with source/proof rather than a local live run: the screenshots show `/compact` getting no Telegram reply before the patch and visible ack replies after, and current source routes native commands through dispatcher-owned reply resolution. I did not run a live Telegram repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can preserve the useful Telegram `/compact` ack while restoring dispatcher admission and hook ownership.
